items.name: pipeML
items.description: A flexible and modular machine learning framework designed to support leakage-free model training through custom cross-validation fold construction

items.name: qlib-alpha
items.description: Qlib-Alpha: A quantitative trading research framework built on Microsoft Qlib for China A-share market. Features machine learning models (LightGBM, XGBoost, Linear) for stock return forecasting, complete backtesting workflows, and customizable trading strategies.

items.name: Uncertainty-Aware-Multi-Agent-Auto-Scaling-in-Distributed-Containerized-Systems
items.description: A Predictive and Risk-Adaptive Framework using Machine Learning

items.name: Face-Recognition-Attendance-System
items.description: A face recognition attendance system using Django and machine learning involves using the Django web framework to build a web-based application for recording and managing employee/student attendance, and using machine learning algorithms to implement the face recognition functionality.

items.name: Improved-Molecular-Graph-Aggregation-Strategies-for-Robust-Prediction-of-ADME
items.description: In this study, we present a systematic benchmarking framework to evaluate molecular representation strategies for ADME prediction, comparing classical descriptor-based machine learning models with graph neural network (GNN) architectures implemented within a message passing and aggregation paradigm.

items.name: finstream-metaopt
items.description: Implementation of an adaptive machine learning system for non-stationary financial data streams. The framework combines temporally diverse ensemble models with meta-heuristic optimization to dynamically adjust model influence under concept drift.

items.name: Foam-Agent
items.description: Foam-Agent: An end-to-end, composable multi-agent framework for automating CFD simulations in OpenFOAM. NeurIPS 2025 Machine Learning and the Physical Sciences Workshop.

items.name: Self-Sovereign-Office-Agents-and-Their-Incremental-Learning-Framework
items.description: Contents: Steps toward a brand-new Self-Sovereign Computing paradigm of Machine Learning

items.name: adc-ml-characterization
items.description: Automated ADC characterization framework with machine learning-based yield prediction and test optimization. Simulates mixed signal testing workflows including INL, DNL, SNR extraction and intelligent pass/fail classification.

items.name: llm-healthcare-reasoning
items.description: Comparative framework for healthcare AI reasoning using machine learning, retrieval-augmented generation (RAG), and in-context learning (ICL). Evaluates accuracy, robustness, and knowledge drift to support reliable, interpretable decision-making in clinical settings.

items.name: AIX
items.description: A lean Torch like C++ machine learning framework with multiple device acceleration support.

items.name: HVIface_MMAD
items.description: A computational framework for predicting protein–protein interaction interfaces between human and viral proteins using sequence-based features and machine learning approaches.

items.name: Diabetes-Complication-Risk-Prediction-Model
items.description: A machine learning project that predicts diabetes-related complications such as cardiovascular disease, kidney disease, and neuropathy using patient clinical data. The project includes data cleaning, preprocessing, feature engineering, exploratory data analysis, and a multi-label classification framework.

items.name: social-twins
items.description: A Machine Learning framework for discovering and characterizing scenarios from trajectory datasets into different interaction types by combining state-of-the-art trajectory forecasting and embedding quantization techniques.

items.name: Empirical-analysis-of-machine-learning-methods-for-change-point-detection-in-financial-time-series.
items.description: Large-scale empirical study of machine learning approaches for change-point detection in financial time series, comparing neural architectures (LSTM, GRU, Transformer, TFT, Mamba) with classical methods under a unified stochastic simulation framework.

items.name: MLOps-Production-Pipeline-E2E
items.description: This repository demonstrates a complete, production-grade Machine Learning lifecycle. Inspired by the 'Made With ML' framework, this project goes beyond model training to implement robust data engineering, automated testing, and CI/CD deployment.

items.name: TinyOL-Simulation
items.description: Interactive dashboard and traffic simulation for the TinyOL lightweight edge machine learning framework.

items.name: hvacML
items.description: hvacML is an expandable machine learning framework practice project created in 2022. Rather than being a hardcoded set of scripts, its primary design goal is providing a highly extensible, object-oriented architecture to standardize the pipeline of building, tuning, and evaluating any time-series energy model.

items.name: nea-ml-dynamics
items.description: Machine learning framework for NEA dynamical classification using short-duration backward integrations

items.name: refiner
items.description: Refiner by Macrodata Labs, a data processing framework for Machine Learning large scale datasets

items.name: ECML_PKDD_2026_TurboFan
items.description: This is a python package to reproduce the results for a paper entitled : "A Machine Learning Framework for Turbofan Health Estimation via Inverse Problem Formulation"

items.name: factor-augmented-inflation-nowcasting-and-forecasting
items.description: Central bank-grade factor-augmented inflation nowcasting and forecasting framework for Zimbabwe. Combines PCA-based macroeconomic factor extraction, machine learning models (Elastic Net, Random Forest, SVR, XGBoost), scenario analysis, and inflation regime classification aligned to SADC targets.

items.name: DeepGNN
items.description: DeepGNN is a framework for training machine learning models on large scale graph data.

items.name: ML-Integrated-TwoProbeDiFC
items.description: machine learning–integrated framework for diffuse in vivo flow cytometry (DiFC), using a convolutional neural network (CNN) to distinguish circulating tumor cell (CTC) signals from artifacts. The approach leverages both amplitude and temporal peak shape to improve detection accuracy and reduce false positives compared to threshold-based methods.

items.description: NeuroBED_ML is an open-source dataset and analysis framework for multimodal machine learning analyses in bulimic-type eating disorders (BN, BED)

items.description: Central bank-grade factor-augmented inflation nowcasting and forecasting framework for Zimbabwe. Combines PCA-based macroeconomic factor extraction, machine learning models (Elastic Net, Random Forest, SVR, XGBoost), scenario analysis, and inflation regime classification aligned to SADC targets.

The application accepts various parameters such as Nitrogen, Phosphorus, Potassium, temperature, humidity, pH, rainfall, etc., proc

items.name: UGT-SPEC
items.description: UGT-SPEC: A multi-stage machine learning framework for predicting UGT substrate selectivity and metabolic sites.

items.name: Predictive-And-Causal-Analytics-For-Construction-Project-Delay-And-Cost-Overrun
items.description: The repository address recurring cost overruns and schedule delays in capital construction projects by developing an integrated predictive, causal, and simulation-based decision support framework. Conventional machine learning models can classify risky projects, but they do not show whether alternative management arrangements would improve outcomes

items.description: Polygenic risk score (PGS) and machine learning framework for primary open-angle glaucoma prediction in African ancestry cohorts.

items.name: scikit-learn_bench
items.description: scikit-learn_bench benchmarks various implementations of machine learning algorithms across data analytics frameworks. It currently support the scikit-learn, DAAL4PY, cuML, and XGBoost frameworks for commonly used machine learning algorithms.

items.name: Digital-Twin-Framework-for-Industrial-Asset-Prognostics
items.description: This project is a Digital Twin–based predictive maintenance system that uses sensor data and machine learning to estimate the Remaining Useful Life (RUL) of industrial equipment. By forecasting failures before they occur, the system enables proactive maintenance scheduling, reducing downtime, costs, and operational risks.

items.name: MLServer
items.description: An inference server for your machine learning models, including support for multiple frameworks, multi-model serving and more

items.name: FW_XFL
items.description: The XFL Framework is a software platform that enables the configuration of experimentation parameters, the selection of measurement metrics, the deployment, and the visualization of results of a distributed machine learning algorithm (XFL) on real hardware nodes.

items.description: Repository for the publication: Predicting Immune Checkpoint Blockade Response: A Multi-Omics-Based Machine Learning Framework and Network Analysis of Key Genes

items.name: AutoML-AdvancedML
items.description: Course project for the Machine Learning (Advanced) class at CEU. This repository implements a simple AutoML framework for regression using simulated annealing to select models and tune hyperparameters, with different temperature multipliers for model and hyperparameter changes. The approach is compared with TPOT and auto-sklearn.

items.name: fake-news-detection-ml
items.description: This project detects whether a news article is Fake or Real using Machine Learning techniques. The system uses TF-IDF for feature extraction and Logistic Regression for classification. LIME is used to explain predictions by highlighting important words influencing the decision. The model is deployed using Flask web framework.

items.name: ytopt
items.description: ytopt: machine-learning-based autotuning and hyperparameter optimization framework using Bayesian Optimization

items.name: Machine-Learning-Based-Harmonic-Distortion-Detection-and-Classification
items.description: Machine learning framework for detecting, classifying, and correcting harmonic distortions in power system signals using signal processing and deep learning techniques.

items.name: CTVAM-VulnerabilityAnalysisModel
items.description: CTVAM (Cybersecurity Threat & Vulnerability Analysis Model) is a modular framework for ingesting NVD CVE data, preprocessing vulnerability metrics, performing feature engineering, generating analytics, and applying machine-learning models for severity prediction and risk insights.

items.name: SpeakUpAI
items.description: SpeakUp AI is an Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning project focused on voice-driven human-computer interaction. The system uses speech-to-text conversion, intent recognition, and NLP pipelines to interpret user commands and generate intelligent responses. Built with Python and modern ML frameworks.

items.name: MIPLearn
items.description: Framework for solving discrete optimization problems using a combination of Mixed-Integer Linear Programming (MIP) and Machine Learning (ML)

items.name: HOOPS-AI-tutorials
items.description: Tech Soft 3D tutorials of python CAD framework for machine learning development. Requires HOOPS AI

items.description: A machine learning inference orchestration framework for the browser end

items.name: SDN-Carbon-Smart-Grid
items.description: A forecast-driven SDN framework that uses machine learning–predicted carbon intensity to dynamically route smart grid communication, minimizing emissions while balancing latency.

items.name: dee_gnn
items.description: dee_gnn is a machine learning framework for predicting molecular encapsulation properties using graph neural networks

items.name: Industrial-carbon-emissions-in-China
items.description: This repository contains high-resolution industrial carbon emission data for China, covering the period from 2000 to 2020. The dataset was developed using a machine learning-based framework that integrates land-use probability and geospatial datasets at a 30m resolution, offering an enhanced spatial understanding of industrial carbon emissions.

items.name: Comparative-Machine-Learning-Framework-for-Binary-Bioactivity-Classification-of-Drug-Like-Compounds
items.description: This project implements a machine learning pipeline for binary classification of drug-like compounds using ChEMBL bioactivity data. Features include molecular descriptors and fingerprints. Models such as SVM, RF, KNN, CNN, and SNN are evaluated, with classical methods achieving the best performance.

items.name: brain4j
items.description: Open-source machine learning framework for Java. Designed with speed and lightweight in mind.

items.name: blazerpc
items.description: A lightweight, framework-agnostic gRPC library for serving machine learning models in Python.

items.name: ARTIST
items.description: A differentiable ray tracer using the PyTorch machine-learning framework in Python.

items.name: Prognostic_Framework_for_Multi-Disease_Prediction_Using_ML
items.description: Developed a prognostic framework leveraging machine learning algorithms for early and accurate prediction of multiple diseases. The model integrates patient health data and clinical parameters to enhance diagnostic precision and support preventive healthcare decisions.

items.name: CHURNGUARD
items.description: A machine learning framework for predicting customer attrition in telecommunication.

items.name: JavaMLBugDetective
items.description: A machine learning-aided bug prediction framework for Java projects combining static code analysis and evolutionary context modeling.

items.name: ms-subtype-classification-xai
items.description: Explainable Machine Learning framework for Multiple Sclerosis (MS) subtype classification (RRMS, SPMS, PPMS) using clinical and MRI-derived features, integrating SHAP-based interpretability and counterfactual explanations for actionable insights.

items.description: Causal machine learning framework for pharmacovigilance signal detection in electronic health records: Drug-induced acute kidney injury

items.description: Replication code for: Beyond Directional Accuracy — An Economic Feasibility Framework for Machine Learning Trading Strategies Under Realistic Market Frictions. Under review at Expert Systems with Applications.

items.description: Global machine learning glacier mass balance framework, capable of assimilating all sources of glaciological and remote sensing data

items.name: Data-science-projects-
items.description: A collection of data science projects, experiments, and research. Includes machine learning models, data visualizations, and analysis on various datasets. Built with Python, and more. *Tech Used*: Python, libraries, frameworks

items.name: SMART-HUNTER
items.description: This project is an Automated Penetration Testing and Vulnerability Scanning Framework. It is designed to all-in-one automated handles everything from initial web reconnaissance to vulnerability detection. A unique aspect of this framework is its integration of Machine Learning to intelligently predict vulnerabilities based on reconnaissance data.

items.description: Two-phase computational framework consisting of causal inference model and residual machine learning classfier for identifying and predicting responders to Alzheimer's Disease treatments

items.description: Recreation of a python ml framework without any ai libraries in order to better understand the methods behind machine learning

items.name: CapstoneProject
items.description: Capstone project for the Imperial College London AI & Machine Learning Certificate, showcasing end-to-end ML development — from data preparation to model training, evaluation, and insights using Python and modern ML frameworks.

items.name: QStrata
items.description: Quantum Machine Learning Framework on Python for diverse machine learning tasks.

items.name: pennylane-qulacs
items.description: The PennyLane-Qulacs plugin integrates the Qulacs quantum computing framework with PennyLane's quantum machine learning capabilities.

items.name: DistroML
items.description: DistroML is an enterprise-grade distributed machine learning training framework designed to accelerate deep learning workflows across multiple GPUs, nodes, and cloud environments.

items.name: leakage-free-diabetes-risk-prediction
items.description: Leakage-free Machine Learning Framework for Diabetes Risk Prediction

items.name: mlcraft
items.description: A lightweight, numpy-first machine learning framework with unified evaluation, tuning, and reporting.

items.name: MetaEdge-Diagnostics
items.description: A decentralized machine learning framework that combines Federated Learning (Flower), MAML (Model Agnostic Meta-Learning), and Differential Privacy to provide personalized diagnostics. The system is optimized for resource-constrained hardware using INT8 Post-Training Static Quantization, reducing model size by 74% for ESP32/Mobile deployment.

items.name: NeuralMedic-MultiAgent
items.description: A cross-platform (Python/Java) agentic AI framework designed to automate clinical diagnostics. The system employs specialized autonomous agents to ingest patient data, execute machine learning inferences, and provide actionable medical decision support. Optimized for early detection of chronic and infectious diseases.

items.name: Physics-Informed-Machine-Learning-for-Bearing-Fault-Diagnosis
items.description: An advanced framework for mechanical fault diagnosis using Physics-Informed Machine Learning (PiML). Combines TLS-DMD, physics-driven feature extraction, and Random Forest on the CWRU Bearing Dataset to achieve 98-99% accuracy.

items.name: ALP-Age-Prediction
items.description: A machine learning framework developed to predict human age groups using alkaline phosphatase (ALP) levels measured from blood and saliva samples under fresh and dried conditions.

items.name: Multi-vital-Monitoring-System-using-federated-ML
items.description: Federated Multivital Monitoring System > A privacy-preserving machine learning framework for real-time health monitoring. This system uses Federated Learning (Flower/Custom) to train models on vital sign data (ECG, Heart Rate, Arrhythmia) without ever moving sensitive patient data from local devices.

items.name: BayesRT
items.description: Machine Learning Framework for Formula 1 Race Strategy Optimization

items.name: Federated-Learning-Framework
items.description: A lightweight framework for implementing federated learning in decentralized environments. Designed for privacy-preserving machine learning and scalable model training.

items.name: AdaptiveScheduler
items.description: A self-adaptive CPU scheduling framework using reinforcement learning and machine learning techniques.

items.name: ia-model-calibration
items.description: A standardized automation framework for initializing Python AI & Machine Learning workspaces. Features dynamic PyTorch/CUDA environment isolation, Jupyter kernel integration, and structured workspace directory scaffolding.

items.name: apax
items.description: A flexible and performant framework for training machine learning potentials.

items.description: IE University Capstone: Airline Passenger Satisfaction — Integrated Psychometric & ML Framework (IRT, K-Means, Random Forest, SHAP, Strategic Priority Matrix)

items.name: Interpretable-XGBoost-SHAP-Model-for-UHPC-Compressive-Strength
items.description: A comprehensive machine learning framework for predicting UHPC compressive strength incorporating multi-model evaluation, cross-validation, and SHAP-based interpretability.

items.name: AI-Assisted-Web-Application-Vulnerability-Detection-and-False-Positive-Reduction-Framework
items.description: This project develops an AI-assisted security testing framework that enhances web application vulnerability scanning. It uses Burp Suite to detect common vulnerabilities and applies a machine learning model to classify results as true or false positives, reducing false alarms and improving detection accuracy.
